transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: Today, we're talking with Dr. Andrew Gallimore.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: He's a Cambridge-trained chemist and neuroscientist,

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: and he spent 30 years studying one molecule, DMT,

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: what he calls the world's strangest psychedelic.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: Many people report meeting entities when using DMT,

text: and Andrew has a theory about them that's not exactly mainstream.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: He writes about this in his book, Death by Astonishment.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: He thinks the beings people meet on DMT might not be hallucinations.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt
text: They might be real, alive, sentient, and living in another dimension.

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt

The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt

transcript_title: The Why Files The Basement Andrew Gallimore Dmt Didnt

text: It connects the whole thing to consciousness itself.
